case_title: NATIONAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. GLAM INSURANCE SERVICES LLC ET AL
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER NATIONAL CASUALTY COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT GLAM INSURANCE SERVICES LLC WILLIAMS, KOREASA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100047935) FILED BY PETITIONER NATIONAL CASUALTY COMPANY
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 62446846) FILED BY PETITIONER NATIONAL CASUALTY COMPANY

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO HEAR PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100047935) FILED BY PETITIONER NATIONAL CASUALTY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-14-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER NATIONAL CASUALTY COMPANY RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT GLAM INSURANCE SERVICES LLC WILLIAMS, KOREASA $54,634.67 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $54,634.67, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. PETITIONER IS FURTHER AWARDED THE SUM OF $35,941.10 AGAINST RESPONDENT GLAM INSURANCE, LLC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NATIONAL CASUALTY COMPANY'S MOTION TO HEAR PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Hear Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Waxler, Esq, 310-775-6511 of Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER NATIONAL CASUALTY COMPANY's Motion To Hear Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

Petitioner National Casualty Company's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)
